asset_name: Melanotan II Adverse-Event and Case-Report Evidence
status: SAFETY EVIDENCE MAP ACTIVE — CASE REPORT EXTRACTION PARTIAL
domain: Pigmented lesion changes, priapism, systemic adverse events and product-quality risk
extracted_summary: Published case reports and regulator communications describe clinically significant concerns.
Case reports establish signals and review triggers, not incidence or causation rates.
Unverified online products add identity, dose, contamination and sterility uncertainty.
limitations: Case reports cannot quantify population risk.
Melanoma causation is not established by isolated reports.
permitted_claims: Melanotan II has documented adverse-event signals and prominent regulator warnings.
prohibited_claims: Claim that Melanotan II has been proven to cause melanoma.
Claim that absence of proven causation means safety.
